UG-115  NAMEPLATES. (a) Each pressure vessel shall have a nameplate permanently attached. The nameplate shall bear the information required by UG-116. (b) Nameplates shall be of a material suitable for the service conditions and shall be attached in a location accessible for inspection per UG-93. (c) The nameplate shall include the Manufacturer's name, maximum allowable working pressure, and the design temperature. For additional marking requirements, see UG-116. Certification data shall be recorded in accordance with UG-117 and UG-120. See also UG-94 for reporting requirements.
